LanguageData.PGG_ThingSummoningFailed: The ritual failed to summon any {0}.
LanguageData.PGG_ThingSummoningFailed_Placement: The ritual succeeded, but the summoned items could not be placed!
LanguageData.PGG_SummoningBacklashSuffered: {PAWN_nameDef} suffered psychic backlash from the summoning ritual!
LanguageData.PGG_HellboarCombustion: {0} has spontaneously ignited from the Hellfire Brand!
LanguageData.PGG_CursesRemoved: {0}'s spirit has been cleansed of {1} curses.
LanguageData.PGG_NoCursesFound: The ritual was completed, but no curses were found on {0}.
LanguageData.PGG_ReliquarySoulCaptured: A soul has been trapped within the Reliquary.
LanguageData.PGG_ReliquaryExorcised: The Reliquary has been purged of its captured souls!
